extensions.name: spec-driven
extensions.description: Spec-driven development workflow for greenfield software builds (PRD → specs → milestone implementation)

extensions.name: voice
extensions.description: Draft outbound messages in the user's own voice — loads a VOICE.md style guide before writing

extensions.name: gmail-digest
extensions.description: Gmail digest shortcut — turn "check/digest X updates" into a structured digest of unread Gmail for a label, with per-target tracking

extensions.name: gh-account-resolver
extensions.description: Per-command gh account routing — selects the correct logged-in gh account per Bash command so parallel Claude sessions don't fight over global gh auth state
